'''âp-v-t-n''' ('''kapavtenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lollop|lollop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-v-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lollop|lollop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-v-t-n
|-
! Lemma
| kapavtenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipavtenoko|thipavtenoko]] || [[word:jipavtenoko|jipavtenoko]] || [[word:shipavtenoko|shipavtenoko]] || [[word:kipavtenoko|kipavtenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupavtenoko|thuthupavtenoko]] || [[word:jujupavtenoko|jujupavtenoko]] || [[word:shushupavtenoko|shushupavtenoko]] || [[word:kukupavtenoko|kukupavtenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupavtenoko|thupavtenoko]] || [[word:jupavtenoko|jupavtenoko]] || [[word:shupavtenoko|shupavtenoko]] || [[word:kupavtenoko|kupavtenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupavtenoko|thupavtenoko]] || [[word:jupavtenoko|jupavtenoko]] || [[word:shupavtenoko|shupavtenoko]] || [[word:kupavtenoko|kupavtenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepavtenoko|thepavtenoko]] || [[word:jepavtenoko|jepavtenoko]] || [[word:shepavtenoko|shepavtenoko]] || [[word:kepavtenoko|kepavtenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopavtenoko|thothopavtenoko]] || [[word:jojopavtenoko|jojopavtenoko]] || [[word:shoshopavtenoko|shoshopavtenoko]] || [[word:kokopavtenoko|kokopavtenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopavtenoko|thopavtenoko]] || [[word:jopavtenoko|jopavtenoko]] || [[word:shopavtenoko|shopavtenoko]] || [[word:kopavtenoko|kopavtenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopavtenoko|thopavtenoko]] || [[word:jopavtenoko|jopavtenoko]] || [[word:shopavtenoko|shopavtenoko]] || [[word:kopavtenoko|kopavtenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠpavtenoko|thĂŠpavtenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠpavtenoko|jĂŠpavtenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠpavtenoko|shĂŠpavtenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠpavtenoko|kĂŠpavtenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapavtenoko|thathapavtenoko]] || [[word:jajapavtenoko|jajapavtenoko]] || [[word:shashapavtenoko|shashapavtenoko]] || [[word:kakapavtenoko|kakapavtenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapavtenoko|thapavtenoko]] || [[word:japavtenoko|japavtenoko]] || [[word:shapavtenoko|shapavtenoko]] || [[word:kapavtenoko|kapavtenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapavtenoko|thapavtenoko]] || [[word:japavtenoko|japavtenoko]] || [[word:shapavtenoko|shapavtenoko]] || [[word:kapavtenoko|kapavtenoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shapavtenithi|shapavtenithi]] || [[word:shapavteniji|shapavteniji]] || [[word:shapavtenishi|shapavtenishi]] || [[word:shapavteniki|shapavteniki]]
